source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Helium in an open pipe at T_1 = 21\circ\text{C} has fundamental f_0 equal to the fundamental of a closed pipe of same length filled with hydrogen at T_2 \circ\text{C}. Now both pipes are filled with oxygen at T_2 \circ\text{C}. What is T_2?
